auth.registerSuccess: Registration successful! You can now log in.
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
auth.selectRole: How do you want to use ProxiJob?
auth.roleClientDesc: I need to hire services for my home, business, or project.
auth.roleProfessionalDesc: I'm a professional looking for clients and jobs.
auth.noCardRequired: No credit card required. Sign up in 30 seconds.

landing.badge: The help you need, when you need it
landing.heroSubtitle: Post what you need, get proposals from verified professionals near you and choose the best one. Any service, anywhere in the world.
landing.ctaPro: I'm a pro, I want to work
landing.useCasesSubtitle: Post your need in 30 seconds. Get proposals instantly.
landing.useCase2: I need someone to clean my apartment
landing.useCase4: I want to renovate the bathroom
landing.useCase7: I need to move this weekend
landing.howSubtitle: No calling 10 places. No waiting for quotes. No searching Google.
landing.step1Desc: "My living room shutter is broken". That simple. No endless forms.
landing.step2Desc: Verified professionals near you send their proposal with price and availability.
landing.step3Desc: Compare profiles, reviews and prices. Chat directly and close the deal.
landing.dualSubtitle: Whether you need help or want to offer your services.
landing.clientDesc: Post any need: from fixing a leak to finding a piano teacher. Get proposals in minutes, not days.
landing.proDesc: Stop relying on word of mouth. Access clients who need you right now, near you or anywhere.
landing.proBullet1: Real clients who need your service today
landing.proBullet2: You decide which jobs to accept
landing.whyTitle: Why ProxiJob and not something else?
landing.whySubtitle: We're not another job board. We bridge "I need it now" and "I can do it".
landing.why1Desc: Don't wait days. Post what you need and get real proposals with prices in minutes.
landing.why2Desc: Plumber, tutor, babysitter, designer, lawyer, movers... if someone does it, they're here.
landing.why3Desc: Works in your neighborhood or across the world. The first truly global services platform.
landing.why4Desc: Verified reviews, profiles with history and direct chat. Know who you're hiring before you commit.
landing.readyTitle: Got a problem? We have the solution.
landing.readySubtitle: Stop searching. Stop calling. Post what you need and let professionals come to you.
landing.noReviews: No reviews yet. Be the first to try ProxiJob!
landing.allServicesSubtitle: And if your category doesn't exist, create it. ProxiJob grows with you.
